title: Spatial Graph Structure Is Essential: An Ablation Study of GNNs for Tumor Microenvironment Characterization in Breast Histopathology
description: Analysis code, processed data, and figures for the manuscript 'Spatial Graph Structure Is Essential: An Ablation Study of Graph Neural Networks for Tumor Microenvironment Characterization in Breast Histopathology'. This repository provides a comprehensive two-level ablation framework using the BreCAHAD breast histopathology dataset. Level 1 compares traditional morphological (14-d), topological (26-d), and deep features for rare event detection. Level 2 constructs cell spatial graphs and evaluates GATv2 against MLP baselines through Full Graph vs. No Edges vs. Random Edges ablation. All evaluations use case-level stratified group k-fold cross-validation with bootstrap 95% confidence intervals.
